statement: In every magma, Equation 1596 (`x = (y * z) * (z * (z * z))`) implies Equation 1658 (`x = (x * y) * ((y * y) * y)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0186
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op y z) (op z (op z z)))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op x y) (op (op y y) y))
